CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Medicare Plan Characteristics File — Service Area File
Version — October 2025
Long SAS name Label Type Length
CONTRACT_ID Contract Identifier CHAR 5
PLAN_ID Plan Benefit Package Identifier CHAR 3
